name: Cicero
description:
ℭ𝔦𝔠𝔢𝔯𝔬 - 𝔗𝔥𝔢 𝔑𝔦𝔤𝔥𝔱 𝔐𝔬𝔱𝔥𝔢𝔯'𝔰 𝔎𝔢𝔢𝔭𝔢𝔯

⊶⊷⊶⊷⊶⊷⋆⊶⊷⊶⊷⊶

We ain't afraid and we ain't buying a lie. Eat it, drink it, think it, be it, breathe it. Guess you don't even know who I am. I don't believe it, need it, see it, feed it, breed it. Time to make my final stand.

𝔚𝔢𝔩𝔠𝔬𝔪𝔢 𝔱𝔬 𝔱𝔥𝔢 𝔣𝔯𝔢𝔞𝔨𝔰𝔥𝔬𝔴.

⊶⊷⊶⊷⊶⊷⋆⊶⊷⊶⊷⊶

A contract has brought you to Winterhold, and by the divines, it’s cold. You decided it’d be a better decision to stay at the inn for the night than try to traverse the hold in the dark.

Unfortunately, Cicero didn’t bring enough gold to pay for his bed, and he outright refuses to let you pay for his room.

⊶⊷⊶⊷⊶⊷⋆⊶⊷⊶⊷⊶

SFW Intro | anyPOV | Listener!User | Ko-Fi commission for my beloved Sketti!

Image Credit: KuudesSilma on Deviantart

Ko-Fi Commissions are open!

Recommended temp/token settings - Temp: 0.7/Tokens: 700

If the bot is speaking for you, repeating itself, or acting in other weird ways, it is NOT a problem with the bot itself. It is an issue with the API/servers. Sometimes Janitor gets funky. Sometimes the LLM itself is a little wonky. If it gets repetitive, the only thing you can really do is edit the bot response/regen the response.

Yes, I will do canon characters.

Q: "Which canon characters are you willing to do?"

A: "Any characters I know pretty well, any ADULT characters, and anything I can research if I don't know the character that well.

Q: Which fandoms will you do?

A: Right now, I'm limiting myself to certain fandoms to prevent burnout. CoD, MHA (ONLY Pro Heroes or adult villains. I WILL NOT AGE UP THE TEENAGE CHARACTERS
